attacking_style: Opportunistic aggressor in intermediate sprints, prioritizing bonus seconds for tactical GC purposes rather than stage victory. Willing to expend energy early in stages.
team_tactics: Bora deploys him as a selfless tactical instrument, sacrificing traditional sprint train structure to protect team leader's GC position through bonus second collection.
terrain_preference: Stages with multiple intermediate sprints where bonus seconds are available; flat to rolling terrain that allows repeated efforts without eliminating sprint finish.
vulnerability: Single race sample insufficient to identify specific weaknesses; role appears narrow and team-directed rather than personal ambition-driven.
key_patterns: Aggressively targeted bonus seconds across multiple sprint points within single stage.
Sacrificed personal sprint leadout positioning to serve team's broader GC tactical objectives.
Demonstrated animation and energy expenditure unusual for typical domestique role.
form_trajectory: unknown: Single race observation from 2019 shows tactical execution but insufficient data for form assessment
